extensionDescription.message: A Chrome extension that translates the current page with Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview in a concise flow.

apiStatusStoredKeyPrompt.message: A saved key is available. Use Check to verify the connection.

apiStatusChangedKeyPrompt.message: This key changed. Save it or check the connection.

siteHintUnsupported.message: Site auto-translate is unavailable on this page.

sameLanguageError.message: Choose different source and target languages.

swapAutoSourceError.message: When source is set to Auto, choose a specific source language before swapping.

languageDetectionUnavailableError.message: The current page language is not detected yet, so this option can't be saved.

translationContinuing.message: Translating... Finished $COUNT$ batches and continuing with the next one.

translationCompletedMultiBatch.message: Translation complete. Processed $COUNT$ batches in order.

failedTranslationGeneric.message: The last translation failed. Please try again.

modelUnavailableForTranslation.message: This model can't handle translation requests right now.

apiStatusTimeout.message: The API status check timed out.

apiServerUnreachable.message: Couldn't connect to the Gemini server.

missingApiKeyForTranslation.message: Enter your Gemini API key first.

alreadyTranslating.message: A translation is already running. Please wait a moment.

cannotRunTranslationOnPage.message: Translation can't run on this page.

pageChangedPartialApply.message: The page changed, so some paragraphs couldn't be applied. Please try again.

applyTranslationFailed.message: Couldn't apply the translation to the page.

translateEmptyResponse.message: Gemini returned an empty translation result.

responseMissingTranslations.message: Some translations were missing from the Gemini response.

reconnectTranslatedSegmentsFailed.message: Couldn't match the translated result back to the page content.

checkApiKeyAgain.message: Please check your API key again.

pageBodyMissing.message: The page body isn't ready yet.

pageChangedTranslationStopped.message: The page changed, so translation was stopped.

pageChangedCannotApply.message: The page changed, so the translation couldn't be applied.

pageStateChangedNeedsRetranslate.message: The page changed, so translation needs to run again.
